title: baccaurea philippinensis
intro: Baccaurea philippinensis, also known as the Philippine tree grape, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Baccaurea philippinensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Baccaurea philippinensis can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
